resources.string: Install an APK through the native XPad installer path
Open to start the service with Root, or use wireless debugging

With Root, BoomInstaller uses the real XPad OEM installer Provider. With ADB shell, it uses managed 0044 and may spend up to about 5 minutes checking an identity repair. 31317 never installs the target APK.
BoomInstaller service is not running; attempting Root startup…
Requesting root and starting BoomInstaller service…
Root service started; connecting to installer service…
Root permission was denied or the root manager is not ready. Grant BoomInstaller in Magisk, KernelSU, or SukiSU Ultra, then try again.
Root is granted, but the current SU/SELinux policy blocks the Binder connection. Use wireless debugging instead.
Root was granted, but the BoomInstaller service did not connect within 10 seconds. Try again or use wireless debugging.
A Shizuku service connected with the wrong runtime identity: %1$s
The selected APK cannot be read
Installing through managed 0044; read-only checks after identity repair may take up to about 5 minutes…
Installing through the XPad OEM Provider with authorized Root…
Installer identity repair was committed and Android is still refreshing. Wait, then tap Recheck; do not tap Install again.
Installer identity is ready. You can tap Install again.
The embedded xpad-install v0.2.13 engine failed integrity or self-test checks. Reinstall the official BoomInstaller APK.
The protected installer stopped because a core process changed. Restart the tablet normally before trying again. Diagnostic log: %1$s
Android did not report the expected installed package after xpad-install completed. Diagnostic log: %1$s
